name: scrollsnap
description: Recover traceable long-page coordinates and minimal crops from scroll recordings.

tools.name: analyze_scroll_recording
tools.description: Analyze a scroll recording and write trace.json.

tools.name: query_scroll_crop
tools.description: Find source-frame crops covering a long-image bbox.

tools.name: parse_scroll_region
tools.description: Extract minimal crops and pass them to a visual parser adapter.
